title: Debug duplicate house listing workflow runs

log.context: Debug duplicate house listing workflow runs

Here's the full diagnosis and what was done:

**Root cause:** The `post_listings_summary` activity in `/mnt/data/temporal-workflows/activities/discord_act.py` had a non-atomic design: it posted the Discord message successfully, then tried to add 👍/👎 reactions. Discord returned a 429 rate limit on the second reaction, which caused a `RuntimeError` to be raised. Temporal treated this as an activity failure and retried it — but retrying re-posted the entire message from the top, creating a duplicat...(truncated)
